parameters.name: activecook
parameters.label: Active Cook
parameters.description: Determines when to cook the .

parameters.name: cookpulse
parameters.label: Cook Pulse
parameters.description: Manually force the OP Find to update.

parameters.name: component
parameters.label: Component
parameters.description: The path to the component where the search starts from.

parameters.name: includecomponent
parameters.label: Include Component
parameters.description: Include the component the search starts from in the search itself.

parameters.name: includewired
parameters.label: Include Wire Hierarchy
parameters.description: Any components wired to the starting component are included in the search.

parameters.name: mindepth
parameters.label: Minimum Depth
parameters.description: Set a minmum depth for the sub-components the OP Find should recursively search through.

parameters.name: limitmaxdepth
parameters.label: Limit Max Depth
parameters.description: Turns on the Maximum Depth parameter to limit searching through sub-components. Turning this toggle off will search through all sub-networks.

parameters.name: maxdepth
parameters.label: Maximum Depth
parameters.description: Set the maximum depth for the sub-components the OP Find should recursively search through.

parameters.name: limitmaxops
parameters.label: Limit Max Operators
parameters.description: Limit the total number of operators iterated in the search.

parameters.name: maxops
parameters.label: Maximum Operators
parameters.description: Number of operators the search is limited to.

parameters.name: objects
parameters.label: Object COMPs
parameters.description: Include Object COMPs, like Geo , in the search.

parameters.name: panels
parameters.label: Panel COMPs
parameters.description: Include Panel COMPs, like , in the search.

parameters.name: other
parameters.label: Other COMPs
parameters.description: Include other type COMPs, like Base , in the search.

parameters.name: tops
parameters.label: TOPs
parameters.description: Include family operators in the search.

parameters.name: chops
parameters.label: CHOPs
parameters.description: Include family operators in the search.

parameters.name: sops
parameters.label: SOPs
parameters.description: Include family operators in the search.

parameters.name: mats
parameters.label: MATs
parameters.description: Include family operators in the search.

parameters.name: dats
parameters.label: DATs
parameters.description: Include family operators in the search.

parameters.name: casesensitive
parameters.label: Case Sensitive
parameters.description: Use case sensitivity in all pattern matching below.

parameters.name: combinefilters
parameters.label: Combine Filters
parameters.description: Combine 'All', 'Any' or 'Custom' of the filters below to get a match. 'Custom' allows for specifying a subselection of filters with 'or' and 'and' keywords.

parameters.name: customcombine
parameters.label: Custom Combine
parameters.description: Specify which filters to combine in the search.

parameters.name: namefilter
parameters.label: Name
parameters.description: Use the operator's names like 'wave1', 'wave2', etc.

parameters.name: typefilter
parameters.label: Type
parameters.description: Use names like and . Look at the column Type to see the syntax.

parameters.name: parentshortcutfilter
parameters.label: Parent Shortcut
parameters.description: Only match operators that include the here specified .

parameters.name: opshortcutfilter
parameters.label: OP Shortcut
parameters.description: Only match operators that include the here specified OP .

parameters.name: pathfilter
parameters.label: Path
parameters.description: Specify a path that the operator should be located in.

parameters.name: parentfilter
parameters.label: Parent Path (relative)
parameters.description: Specify a relative parent path that operators should be located in. This is a filter option on the column of this that can be enabled by toggling the parameter on this 's page.

parameters.name: excludefilter
parameters.label: Exclude Path (relative)
parameters.description: Specify a relative path that should be excluded from the search.

parameters.name: commentfilter
parameters.label: Comment
parameters.description: Only match operators that include the here specified comment string.

parameters.name: tagsfilter
parameters.label: Tags
parameters.description: Only match operators that match the here specified tags. Multiple tags can be searched for as a space seperated list.

parameters.name: textfilter
parameters.label: DAT Text
parameters.description: Only include operators that - in the case of being from the family - match specified string in their content.

parameters.name: parnamefilter
parameters.label: Par Name
parameters.description: Only match operators with specified parameter name.  Parameters must match ALL of name, value and expression to be included.

parameters.name: parvaluefilter
parameters.label: Par Value
parameters.description: Only include operators that match specified parameter value. Parameters must match ALL of name, value and expression to be included.

parameters.name: parexpressionfilter
parameters.label: Par Expression
parameters.description: Only include operators that match specified parameter expression string. Parameters must match ALL of name, value and expression to be included.

parameters.name: parnondefaultonly
parameters.label: Par Non-Default Only
parameters.description: Only match with parameters that are non-default values.

parameters.name: legacycols
parameters.label: Use Legacy Columns
parameters.description: Use only when expecting column headers to be named with legacy titles.

parameters.name: idcol
parameters.label: ID
parameters.description: An integer that uniquely defines the node in this process. It's the same number for the duration of the process, but may be different when you run the process again.

parameters.name: namecol
parameters.label: Name
parameters.description: Inlcude the name of the operator in the result table.

parameters.name: typecol
parameters.label: Type
parameters.description: Include the operator type in the result table. For example .

parameters.name: parentshortcutcol
parameters.label: Parent Shortcut
parameters.description: Include the operator's in the result table.

parameters.name: opshortcutcol
parameters.label: OP Shortcut
parameters.description: Include the operator's OP in the result table.

parameters.name: pathcol
parameters.label: Path
parameters.description: Include the operator's path in the result table.

parameters.name: relpathcol
parameters.label: Relative Path
parameters.description: Include the operator's, relative to the search root, path in the result table.

parameters.name: parentpath
parameters.label: Parent Path
parameters.description: Include the parent path.

parameters.name: wirepathcol
parameters.label: Wire Path
parameters.description: Include the operator's wire path in the result table.

parameters.name: depthcol
parameters.label: Depth
parameters.description: Include a column showing the relative depth to the root path of the found operator.

parameters.name: cooktimescol
parameters.label: Cook Times
parameters.description: Include cook-time of found operators.

parameters.name: tagscol
parameters.label: Tags
parameters.description: Include the operator's tags.

parameters.name: genprop
parameters.label: General Properties
parameters.description: Include the operator's name, id, isCOMP, node position, node size and dock id in the result table.

parameters.name: cputime
parameters.label: CPU Time
parameters.description: Include the operator's CPU cooktime in the result table.

parameters.name: gputime
parameters.label: GPU Time
parameters.description: Include the operator's cooktime in the result table.

parameters.name: cpumem
parameters.label: CPU Memory
parameters.description: Include the operator's CPU memory in the result table.

parameters.name: gpumem
parameters.label: GPU Memory
parameters.description: Include the operator's memory in the result table.

parameters.name: children
parameters.label: Children
parameters.description: Include the children of the operator in the result table.

parameters.name: callbacks
parameters.label: Callbacks DAT
parameters.description: to a containing callbacks for each event received. See for usage.

parameters.name: convertbool
parameters.label: Convert Bool to Int
parameters.description: For boolean logic values, the value will be '1' or '0'. When this parameter is Off, they will be 'True" or 'False'.

parameters.name: convertnone
parameters.label: Convert None to Empty
parameters.description: For 'None' values, the value will be converted to Empty.

parameters.name: language
parameters.label: Language
parameters.description: Select how the decides which script language to operate on.

parameters.name: extension
parameters.label: Edit/View Extension
parameters.description: Select the file extension this should expose to external editors.

parameters.name: customext
parameters.label: Custom Extension
parameters.description: Specifiy the custom extension.

parameters.name: wordwrap
parameters.label: Word Wrap
parameters.description: Enable Word Wrap for Node Display.

parameters.name: utility
parameters.label: Utility
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: pops
parameters.label: Pops
parameters.description: Help Not Available.
